bestPuffinessMetric.reasoning: Chosen for strongest combination of coverage (93 files), distribution spread (0.149 normalized), harbor sensitivity gap (0.094), and venue ordering signal (5/7 ordered comparisons).

bestShiftinessMetric.reasoning: Chosen for strongest combination of coverage (93 files), distribution spread (0.624 normalized), harbor sensitivity gap (41.942), and venue ordering signal (4/7 ordered comparisons).

bestTrimmingStrategy.reasoning: Wind-gated preserved 88.8% of points on average while reducing mean baseline CV by 0.045 and mean circular std dev by 0.752 versus untrimmed data. It directly removes calm harbor periods while preserving much more of each session than speed-gating.
